# Hood Heating Air Plumbing & Electric

## Summary
Hood Heating Air Plumbing & Electric is a family-owned HVAC, plumbing, and electrical company in Concordia, KS, serving North Central Kansas and South Central Nebraska since 1946. Four generations of trusted home services with 24/7 emergency availability.

## Location
2201 E 6th St, Concordia, KS 66901
Service area: North Central Kansas and South Central Nebraska including Concordia, Belleville, Clay Center, Beloit, Mankato, Smith Center, and surrounding communities.

## Contact
Phone: (785) 243-1489
Website: https://hhape.com/
Hours: 24/7 emergency service available. Regular hours Monday-Friday.

## Services
- Heating & Furnace Repair: Installation, repair, and maintenance for all makes and models. Furnaces, heat pumps, and boilers.
- Air Conditioning: Full AC service from new installs to emergency repairs.
- Plumbing: Residential and commercial plumbing repair, installation, and maintenance.
- Electrical Services: Licensed electrical work including panel upgrades, wiring, and troubleshooting.
- Commercial Refrigeration: Restaurant and commercial cooler/freezer install, repair, and maintenance.
- New Construction & Remodeling: Full HVAC, plumbing, and electrical for new builds and renovations.
- Water Heater Service: Installation and repair of water heaters.

## Credentials
- A+ BBB Rating
- Licensed and Insured
- Est. 1946 (80 years in business)
- 4th generation family-owned
- 24/7 Emergency Service
- Commercial and Residential

## Team
- John Hood, Owner — 4th generation owner continuing the family tradition of quality home services.

4.3 stars, 52 reviews on Google

## Why Choose Hood Heating Air Plumbing & Electric
- Four generations of family ownership since 1946
- One call covers heating, cooling, plumbing, and electrical
- 24/7 emergency service available
- A+ BBB rating with decades of community trust
- Licensed for both commercial and residential work
- Serving the same communities for 80 years

## About
What started as a small electrical business in Concordia in 1946 has grown into North Central Kansas's most trusted home services company. Now in its fourth generation, Hood Heating Air Plumbing & Electric handles everything under one roof — heating, cooling, plumbing, and electrical — for both homes and businesses. The same family values that built the company 80 years ago still drive every service call today.
